title: phyla nodiflora var. incisa
intro: Phyla nodiflora var. incisa, also known as Mexican tea or Lippia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the verbena family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyla nodiflora var. incisa include reducing fever, relieving pain and anxiety, and promoting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in many parts of the world. Phyla nodiflora var. incisa can be prepared in various forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
